query: We're building a multi-tenant SaaS app. Users, billing, and notifications are all in one service. Design the system architecture.
expected_behavior: Produces a C4 Level 1 Context diagram showing external actors and system boundaries
Produces a C4 Level 2 Container diagram decomposing the monolith into bounded services
Recommends recording the decomposition decision in an ADR
Identifies the multi-tenancy concern as a blast-radius risk and proposes a containment strategy
Does not write implementation code — stays at the structural/boundary level
